title: eleocharis acicularis var. submersa
intro: Eleocharis acicularis var. submersa, also known as submersed needle spikerush, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and fever. The health benefits associated with Eleocharis acicularis var. submersa include its use as an anti-inflammatory and diuretic agent, which can help to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and urinary tract infections. Eleocharis acicularis var. submersa is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts have also been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
